findings.summary: No datasheets directory found (15/49 parts have MPNs). Sync datasheets before making pin-level claims.
findings.recommendation: Run datasheet sync via the digikey / mouser / lcsc / element14 skill (which one depends on the user's distributor access and API credentials). A ./datasheets/ directory with PDFs and a manifest.json enables pin-level verification in the next analyzer run.

report_context.impact: Review claims must stay at consistency level until datasheets land.

findings.description: I2C bus with 1 device(s) (U1) has no pull-up on SCL net __unnamed_33.
findings.recommendation: Add a 4.7k pull-up resistor from SCL to VDD.

fix_params.basis: I2C spec requires pull-ups on SCL

report_context.impact: I2C bus non-functional

findings.description: I2C bus with 1 device(s) (U1) has no pull-up on SDA net __unnamed_32.
findings.recommendation: Add a 4.7k pull-up resistor from SDA to VDD.

fix_params.basis: I2C spec requires pull-ups on SDA

report_context.impact: I2C bus non-functional

findings.description: Power regulator (LDO) detected

findings.summary: U1 pin SDA (__unnamed_32) missing pull-up resistor
findings.description: Pin SDA on U1 (INA226) is connected to net __unnamed_32 but has no pull-up resistor. This pin type typically requires an external pull-up to a power rail for correct operation.
findings.recommendation: Add a 4.7k-10k pull-up resistor from __unnamed_32 to the appropriate power rail.

fix_params.basis: Pin SDA is open-drain/input type requiring pull-up

report_context.impact: Pin may float or bus may not function without pull-up

findings.summary: U1 pin SCL (__unnamed_33) missing pull-up resistor
findings.description: Pin SCL on U1 (INA226) is connected to net __unnamed_33 but has no pull-up resistor. This pin type typically requires an external pull-up to a power rail for correct operation.
findings.recommendation: Add a 4.7k-10k pull-up resistor from __unnamed_33 to the appropriate power rail.

fix_params.basis: Pin SCL is open-drain/input type requiring pull-up

report_context.impact: Pin may float or bus may not function without pull-up

RC-network RC filter
RC-network RC filter
Net +24V_CTRL carries power_in pins but has no power_out pin, no PWR_FLAG, no regulator output mapping, and no bridged solder jumper path to a sourced net.
findings.recommendation: Add a PWR_FLAG to declare the rail as externally powered (e.g. from a connector) or trace the rail back to a regulator output. If the source lives on another sheet, promote the net name to a global label.

report_context.impact: Rail has no source visible to the analyser; likely a wiring gap or missing PWR_FLAG.

findings.description: Net +24V_DRV carries power_in pins but has no power_out pin, no PWR_FLAG, no regulator output mapping, and no bridged solder jumper path to a sourced net.
findings.recommendation: Add a PWR_FLAG to declare the rail as externally powered (e.g. from a connector) or trace the rail back to a regulator output. If the source lives on another sheet, promote the net name to a global label.

report_context.impact: Rail has no source visible to the analyser; likely a wiring gap or missing PWR_FLAG.

findings.summary: Sourcing blocker: BOM has <50% MPN coverage (7/28 unique parts). Board is not pre-fab ready.
findings.description: Sourcing audit: 7 of 28 unique BOM lines (grouped by value + footprint) carry a manufacturer part number (25.0%). Pre-fab readiness requires 100% coverage; production assembly requires all parts sourceable via one of the supported distributors.
findings.recommendation: Populate the MPN field on the listed refs (use the digikey / mouser / lcsc / element14 skill to search by value/footprint when the MPN isn't already known).

report_context.impact: Pre-fab gate: board cannot be ordered until MPN coverage reaches 100%.

top_issues.summary: I2C bus __unnamed_32/__unnamed_33: SCL missing pull-up
top_issues.description: I2C bus with 1 device(s) (U1) has no pull-up on SCL net __unnamed_33.
top_issues.recommendation: Add a 4.7k pull-up resistor from SCL to VDD.

fix_params.basis: I2C spec requires pull-ups on SCL

report_context.impact: I2C bus non-functional

top_issues.summary: I2C bus __unnamed_32/__unnamed_33: SDA missing pull-up
top_issues.description: I2C bus with 1 device(s) (U1) has no pull-up on SDA net __unnamed_32.
top_issues.recommendation: Add a 4.7k pull-up resistor from SDA to VDD.

fix_params.basis: I2C spec requires pull-ups on SDA

report_context.impact: I2C bus non-functional

top_issues.summary: Sourcing blocker: BOM has <50% MPN coverage (7/28 unique parts). Board is not pre-fab ready.
top_issues.description: Sourcing audit: 7 of 28 unique BOM lines (grouped by value + footprint) carry a manufacturer part number (25.0%). Pre-fab readiness requires 100% coverage; production assembly requires all parts sourceable via one of the supported distributors.
top_issues.recommendation: Populate the MPN field on the listed refs (use the digikey / mouser / lcsc / element14 skill to search by value/footprint when the MPN isn't already known).

report_context.impact: Pre-fab gate: board cannot be ordered until MPN coverage reaches 100%.

top_issues.summary: No datasheets directory found (15/49 parts have MPNs). Sync datasheets before making pin-level claims.
top_issues.recommendation: Run datasheet sync via the digikey / mouser / lcsc / element14 skill (which one depends on the user's distributor access and API credentials). A ./datasheets/ directory with PDFs and a manifest.json enables pin-level verification in the next analyzer run.

report_context.impact: Review claims must stay at consistency level until datasheets land.

top_issues.summary: U1 pin SDA (__unnamed_32) missing pull-up resistor
top_issues.description: Pin SDA on U1 (INA226) is connected to net __unnamed_32 but has no pull-up resistor. This pin type typically requires an external pull-up to a power rail for correct operation.
top_issues.recommendation: Add a 4.7k-10k pull-up resistor from __unnamed_32 to the appropriate power rail.

fix_params.basis: Pin SDA is open-drain/input type requiring pull-up

report_context.impact: Pin may float or bus may not function without pull-up

top_issues.summary: +24V_CTRL has no declared source
top_issues.recommendation: Add a PWR_FLAG to declare the rail as externally powered (e.g. from a connector) or trace the rail back to a regulator output. If the source lives on another sheet, promote the net name to a global label.
